title: canavalia ensiformis var. gladiata
intro: Canavalia ensiformis var. gladiata, also known as Sword Bean or Katuk, is a perennial climbing plant native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, making it a natural remedy for conditions such as hypertension and atherosclerosis. The leaves and seeds of the plant are used in herbal preparations, often consumed as a tea or added to soups and stews, to promote digestion, boost energy, and support immune function. Additionally, the plant is rich in antioxidants and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems.
